entities.description: Critical agricultural input for groundnut production

entities.description: Services providing climate data to farmers to reduce vulnerability

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Training and techniques to improve agricultural resilience to climate change

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in soil quality affecting groundnut yields and land use
